final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing GPT-5.5, with Sam Altman as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a high-end Chinese domestic GP/LP roadshow aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with title area, subtitle area, presenter name, and a focal visual element
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch theme and Sam Altman as named presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative, institutional atmosphere — exact light and mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with top-tier Chinese PE/VC GP roadshow decks — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, professional surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (large, primary headline), "演讲人：Sam Altman" (presenter credit), and a subtitle implying a China fundraising roadshow context
Constraints: must conform to Chinese domestic roadshow (路演) visual conventions; must feel appropriate for GP-level institutional investor audience
Avoid: overly casual or consumer-product aesthetics; cluttered layout
